use_codes.desc: USE OF ARIMOCLOMOL, IN COMBINATION WITH MIGLUSTAT, FOR TREATMENT OF NEUROLOGICAL MANIFESTATIONS OF NIEMANN-PICK DISEASE TYPE C (NPC)

indications.text:
MIPLYFFA is indicated for use in combination with miglustat for the treatment of neurological
manifestations of Niemann-Pick disease type C (NPC) in adult and pediatric patients 2 years of age
and older.
